programme.title: Solace
programme.desc: Unable to solve a series of homicides, the FBI enlists a retired consultant with psychic powers.

programme.title: State of Consciousness
programme.desc: An accused killer is forced to take an experimental drug. His recollections turn his life upside down.

programme.title: Regression
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Emma Watson star in this thriller about a small town crime that unmasks a horrifying mystery.

programme.title: Criminal
programme.desc: The memories and skills of a deceased CIA agent are implanted into a dangerous convict.

programme.title: Mud
programme.desc: Two boys discover a desperado on the run. After hearing his incredible tale, they decide to help him.

programme.title: Gang of Roses
programme.desc: A gang of gold-hunting outlaws, headed by the ruthless Left Eye Watkins (Bobby Brown), takes over the peaceful town of Flatridge, tearing the sleepy outpost to shreds as they search for riches. They murder a can-can girl, who is the sister of Rachel (Monica Calhoun), the onetime leader of a notorious all-girl gang. Rachel then rounds up her four old associates, and they seek revenge for her sister. Using teamwork and a sassy attitude, Rachel's gang goes up against Watkins' tough crew.

programme.title: Arlington Road [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Widowed when his FBI agent wife is killed by an extremist group, college professor Michael Faraday (Jeff Bridges) becomes obsessed with the culture of these groups -- especially when his new all-American neighbors, Oliver (Tim Robbins) and Cheryl Lang (Joan Cusack), start acting suspiciously. With each twist, the mystery deepens and questions loom whether Faraday is consumed by fear and driven by paranoia, or whether a lethal conspiracy has been born on Arlington Road.

programme.title: Blind Horizon [Broadcast Edit]
programme.desc: Found in the New Mexico desert with a head wound and total amnesia, Frank Kavanaugh (Val Kilmer) is brought to a hospital. When he recovers some of his memory, he begins raving about an upcoming assassination attempt on the president. Despite the man's unstable state, Sheriff Jack Kolb (Sam Shepard) is troubled by Frank's story. Discovering the truth grows more complicated when Chloe Richards (Neve Campbell) arrives and claims to be Frank's fiancée, even though he has no memory of her.

programme.title: Are You Here
programme.desc: In this touching dramedy, weatherman Steve (Owen Wilson) must join his off-the-grid best friend Ben (Zach Galifianakis) for Ben's estranged father's funeral.

programme.title: Danger Zone
programme.desc: Rick Morgan (Billy Zane), an American engineer who runs a mine in East Africa, is approached one day by his friend Jim Scott (Robert Downey Jr.), who needs someplace to store canisters of toxic waste. Unfortunately, a spill occurs a short time later, resulting in deaths and Morgan having to leave the country. A year later, he is approached by a government agent (Ron Silver) looking for a missing supply of potentially hazardous poison, which in truth hides something even more valuable.

programme.title: The Pledge
programme.desc: A retiring police detective pledges to catch the killer of a young child.

programme.title: Legionnaire
programme.desc: Alain is a boxer in 1925 Marseille, France. When he doesn't take the dive paid to take by a mob boss, he has to split.

programme.title: Limitless
programme.desc: A mysterious pill that enables the user to access 100% of his brain's abilities transforms a struggling writer into a financial wizard, but it also puts him in a new world with many dangers.

programme.title: Hit and Run
programme.desc: A former getaway driver jeopardizes his Witness Protection Plan.

programme.title: Country Strong
programme.desc: A drama centered on a rising country-music songwriter (Hedlund) who sparks with a fallen star (Paltrow). Together, they mount his ascent and her comeback, which leads to romantic complications involving her husband/manager (McGraw) and a beauty queen-turned-singer (Meester).

programme.title: Sunset
programme.desc: A cowboy star and a legendary lawman team up to make a movie... and find out it can be murder.

programme.title: Brian's Song
programme.desc: The story of professional football players Gale Sayers and Brian Piccolo, and how their friendship on and off the field was affected when Piccolo contracted a fatal disease.

programme.title: Little Nikita
programme.desc: A timely espionage thriller which stars River Phoenix as a seemingly average teenager, except in one respect--his real name is Nikita. River Phoenix has been living a dangerous lie and Sidney Poitier is the secret agent who forces him to face the hard truth about his parents true identity in this riveting spy thriller.

programme.title: Dirty
programme.desc: Hard-edged story of a gangbanger turned cop who is forced to choose between his conscience and his loyalty to the code of blue all in the course of one day.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A decorated war veteran becomes entangled in the search for a fellow Medal of Honor winner's killer.

programme.title: Shopworn
programme.desc: Stanwyck is a waitress engaged to Toomey though his mother opposes her son's marriage to Stanwyck. After her release, from a three-month prison sentence, Stanwyck becomes an overnight musical sensation and renews her romance with Toomey and his mother finally consents to the marriage.

programme.title: It Had To Be You
programme.desc: Ginger Rogers stars in this fanciful, screwball comedy as a young woman who has left three grooms standing at the altar...and is about to do it again! Cornel Wilde co-stars as the gentleman who tempts her away from the altar and then succeeds in marrying her himself.

programme.title: The Collector
programme.desc: A mild-mannered bank teller and butterfly collector kidnaps the object of his affections, a young art student, for his collection.

programme.title: The Last Hurrah
programme.desc: An aging New England Mayor is defeated in a hard-fought re-election campaign involving shady transactions by both political groups.

programme.title: LUV
programme.desc: An 11-year-old boy gets a crash course in what it means to be a man when he spends a day with the ex-convict uncle he idolizes.

programme.title: Marlowe
programme.desc: Los Angeles, 1930. A street-wise, down on his luck detective, Philip Marlowe, is hired to find the ex-lover of a glamorous heiress, daughter of a well-known movie star. The disappearance unearths a web of lies, and soon Marlowe is involved in a dangerous, deadly investigation where everyone involved has something to hide.

programme.title: Sisters
programme.desc: A small-time reporter tries to convince the police she saw a murder in the apartment across from hers.

programme.title: Dead Reckoning
programme.desc: A thriller inspired by the Boston Marathon bombing in 2013.

programme.title: Dreamscape
programme.desc: A young psychic on the run from himself is recruited by a government agency experimenting with the use of the dream-sharing technology and is given the inverse task of planting an idea into the mind of the US president.

programme.title: Cartels
programme.desc: A team of DEA agents and a dangerous drug lord await extraction and find themselves trapped in an ambush!

programme.title: Paradise City
programme.desc: A son seeks revenge for the murder of his bounty-hunter father.

programme.title: Judgment Day
programme.desc: A convicted killer is brought in to locate a missing scientist in order to prevent a meteor hitting earth.

programme.title: Butter
programme.desc: Deceit, body heat and pulsing street beats converge in this explosive story about the music industry!

programme.title: Detroit
programme.desc: During the 1967 Detroit riots, a group of rogue police officers respond to a complaint with retribution.

programme.title: Taken From Rio Bravo
programme.desc: Two friends pursue a group of human traffickers that have kidnapped five women in 1874, East Texas.

programme.title: Prey of Wrath
programme.desc: An elite special forces operative is sent by Russian Intelligence to hunt down former teammates who have hijacked nuclear warheads.

programme.title: Andromeda: 1883
programme.desc: Space marine Casey Reynolds travels into the past to stop a killer android bent on wiping out the one person crucial to saving the human race.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Her Deadly Game
programme.desc: When her childhood friend Kayla transfers to her college basketball team, Andrea's reunion turns into a nightmare. Kayla, obsessed with being Andrea's one and only best friend, will harm anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: Brotherhood of Blades 2
programme.desc: A general was forced to kill his partner in an operation and must try to avoid being found guilty while being blackmailed by a mysterious woman. Turns out there is a bigger scheme behind all this.

programme.title: Gundala
programme.desc: Gundala, who has grown up on the streets, must choose between continuing to look out for himself or doing something about the injustice that surrounds him.

programme.title: Night of the Assassin
programme.desc: A hired assassin is paid to assassinate the king.

programme.title: The Rise of Hero
programme.desc: Huang Feihong wants to make a living in Guangzhou. With the help of Zhou Shisan and Lu Yibai, he is finally allowed to take an exam in Guangzhou, and he may be able to study abroad. But after he gets there, he discovers a conspiracy among city leaders and the conservatives in the court led by Eunuch Hai, who wants to end the Studying Abroad Campaign launched by the Westernization Movement.

programme.title: Taken at a Basketball Game
programme.desc: Wayne's worst fear is confirmed when he realizes his daughter has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Stolen By Their Father
programme.desc: Memoir of Lizbeth Meredith, whose abusive ex-husband kidnaps their daughters.

programme.title: Beyond the Headlines: The College Admissions Scandal with Gretchen Carlson
programme.desc: The rich and famous abusing their privilege to get their kids into college

programme.title: The Hillsdale Adoption Scam
programme.desc: Bethany and Terrence are desperate to find another brother for their daughter.

programme.title: Taken at a Basketball Game
programme.desc: Wayne's worst fear is confirmed when he realizes his daughter has been kidnapped.

programme.title: Stolen By Their Father
programme.desc: Memoir of Lizbeth Meredith, whose abusive ex-husband kidnaps their daughters.

programme.title: Heart of the Manor
programme.desc: Real-estate agent Lisa competes with developer Matthew who wants to buy her family's manor.

programme.title: New Dogs, Old Tricks
programme.desc: Pete and DeeDee have an announcement for the Gamma brothers. Across campus, Sarah struggles with her new living situation.

programme.title: Been There All Along
programme.desc: Charley, the founder of a dating app must team up with marketing expert Liam, to save her company.

programme.title: From Italy with Amore
programme.desc: In the quest to find her dream man, Ariel meets Daniel who shows that food is the way to her heart.

programme.title: Falling for the Manny
programme.desc: Alice is up for partner at her firm and hires her sister’s manny, Jacob, to help with her daughter.

programme.title: Hard Lesson
programme.desc: A Jewish parole officer, Jeff Solomon White, struggles in his new role as a reading teacher for illiterate teens at a New York high school. Raised by African American parents, White sees the situation differently and is motivated to fight for his students, who face an almost certain life of crime and prison.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: The Code
programme.desc: A veteran thief recruits a younger crook to help him pull off one final job in order to repay his debt to the Russian mob.

programme.title: Murder Without Motive
programme.desc: Edmund Perry has everything going for him after he graduates with a scholarship to attend Stanford. With his dedication paying off, an encounter with a police officer senselessly ends his life.

programme.title: The Challenger
programme.desc: The Challenger follows the life struggles of a young, Bronx auto mechanic, Jaden Miller. When Jaden and his mother are evicted from their home, he soon finds that boxing may be the key to stop them from living on the streets and the ticket to a better life. With legendary trainer, Duane Taylor, Miller becomes a local hero and captures the attention of a cable network that decides to create a reality show around his goal to fight to the Light-Heavyweight Title.

programme.title: Dank
programme.desc: Herc is trying to make it in the NBA but his finances are making the journey difficult. So he decides to purchase and sell “REEFER” an alternate CBD strand that is being pushed in the streets by a crooked mayor.

programme.title: Complex
programme.desc: The disappearance of a beautiful woman and the murder of another, leads to the investigation of four different families, living inside of one apartment complex.

programme.title: Ebony Hustle 2: Ballistic Protection
programme.desc: Local detective and icon Ebony Hustle returns to help the community and solve cases. This time around she meets local up-and-coming basketball star Mac Pendleton and begins to kindle a romance with him. The two seem to be going strong, till one day Mac starts to become unruly and angry. All the while she encounters an old rival and seeks to make amends and start fresh, to much difficulty. Will Ebony be able to save her new relationship, as well as heal old wounds and continue to thrive?

programme.title: Double Standards
programme.desc: A upstanding perfect couple of their community church 'First Lady Trezjiir Jonez a devoted wife, of Pastor Noble Jonez, that lives a unknown double life, decides to engage in pre-marital counseling sessions in their unstable home, where sexual desires of hidden thirsty passion enter as a fatal demise' will the sin be forgiven or will it be the ultimate judgment day

programme.title: Gutter
programme.desc: Raised in poverty, Gutter realizes thriving in this world, means embracing the streets that made him.

programme.title: Haunting of Winchester House
programme.desc: A family moves into a mansion to act as caretakers, but a malevolent force abducts their daughter.

programme.title: Aquarium of the Dead
programme.desc: When an accident turns animals in an aquarium to zombies, the employees have no choice but to fight back.

programme.title: Freakshow
programme.desc: Thieves hiding out in a circus sideshow decide to steal from the wealthy owner. The consequences are horrific.
Parents, concerned about their son’s violent behavior, learn that their son is the gateway to the apocalypse.

programme.title: Tomb Invader
programme.desc: Determined to find out why her mother disappeared, an adventurer enters the dangerous Tomb of Quin Shi Huang.

programme.title: Universal Soldiers
programme.desc: Unstable and unstoppable genetically modified super soldiers escape from their maximum security holding cells.

programme.title: Blood Hook
programme.desc: Welcome to the 'Muskie Madness' fishing tournament. The local yokels are going insane and five students on vacation are in way over their heads. Peter's friend falls hook, line and sinker for the sexy tournament hostess. Meanwhile a crazed killer is using local jail bait as live bait. The murder weapon? An expertly cast barbed hook. The town sheriff won't admit anything's fishy, especially during the height of tourist season. Now it's up to Peter to reel in the fiendish fisher-of-menor become the catch of the day!

programme.title: Becoming Evil: Cult Of Personality
programme.desc: Homosexual Serial Killers - John Wayne Gacy and the Highway Killers. Serial killings homoerotic aspect is revealed though the grisly exploits of the clown killer, John Wayne Gacy, Atlantas child killer, Wayne Williams, and the highway killers, William Bonin and Randy Kraft.

programme.title: Red Scorpion
programme.desc: A Soviet Special Forces soldier is sent on a mission to infiltrate an African rebel army and assassinate its leader, but the war machine they trained starts to think for himself.

programme.title: Luther The Geek
programme.desc: A young country boy is plunged into the depts of homicidal madness after witnessing the strange exploits of a carnival 'geek,' a caged drunk so desperate for whisky that he bites the heads off live chickens in front of a freak show audience. Thirty years later, Luther is all grown up and out on parole, after spending his childhood behind bars for a series of grisly murders. Armed with only a pair of razor-sharp metal dentures and only able to communicate through chicken clucks, Luther restarts his bloody rampage as he terrorizes the citizens of a small town and takes a young mother and her family hostage in their isolated farmhouse. Featuring one of the most intense endings ever put on film, Luther the Geek is good gory fun in the splatter flick tradition of The Texas Chainsaw Massacre and The Toxic Avenger.

programme.title: Blades
programme.desc: Somewhere in New Jersey, a peaceful country club becomes the hunting ground for a demonically possessed lawnmower with a taste for human flesh.

programme.title: Igor and The Lunatics
programme.desc: Sixteen years agoRandom bloodshed ran rampant and a terrible tidal wave of brutal slaughter flooded Tromaville. The townspeople finally caught up with Igor and his evil blood-thirsty gang and locked them away to rot in prison. Peace and tranquility filled the small village once again. But now theyre on probation Theyre more deranged, demented and deadly than before! IGOR & THE LUNATICS are back to seek revenge upon the town that sent them away, and finish what they started sixteen years ago! If you scare easily, be warned! Prepare yourself for the unrelenting evil and terror of this crazed religious sex cult out for revenge! Get ready for a rampage of brutal raping, torturing and murderingclimaxing in one of the most frightening and violent bloodbaths ever captured on film! Its IGOR & THE LUNATICS!

programme.title: Housemaid, The (2018)
programme.desc: On a plantation in 1953 Indochina, a troubled young housemaid finds comfort in the arms of the widowed owner, until his deceased wife returns to object.

programme.title: Consecration
programme.desc: After her brother dies under strange circumstances, Grace travels to the Mount Saviour Convent for answers. Once there, she uncovers murder, sacrilege, and a shocking truth about her past.

programme.title: Gwen
programme.desc: Gwen is a young girl struggling with her mother's unusual illness, her father's absence and the suspicious local community that has turned on them while evil takes a grip on her home.

programme.desc: A middle-class family travels into rural Indonesia to visit the terminally ill director of the orphanage where the father was raised as a child. Sinister events soon befall them.

programme.title: Springtime in the Sierras
programme.desc: Ads for this Roy Rogers classic roared HEAD FOR THE MUSICAL HILLS...ROY IS GUNNIN' FOR THRILLS! And thrills are what you'll get when you watch this fun, action packed B-Western from Republic Pictures. There's some great comic relief from Andy Devine and Chester Conklin, two of Hollywood's all-time greats. This old-fashioned shoot-'em-up was directed by William Witney, who would go on to direct many of television's top western sagas, including Bonanza, Wagon Train, and The Wild, Wild West.

programme.title: My Pal Trigger
programme.desc: Roy Rogers goes to jail after hes wrongly accused of killing Gabby Hayes horse in this action packed yarn from Republic Pictures. All of the old jokes about cowboys kissing their horse may have started with this very movie, as it focuses on Roys loving relationship with Trigger, the greatest horse in all of Hollywood. The film also features Roys beloved Dale Evans, plus, adding some country swing to the musical numbers is Roys favorite backing band, the Sons of the Pioneers! Songs include Ole Faithful, Long, Long Ago and Livin Western Style.

programme.title: Boots and Saddles
programme.desc: When a young Englishman inherits a ranch, none other than Gene Autry takes up the challenge of turning the Brit into a real westerner. He convinces the Brit to use the ranch to raise horses, but things quickly grow complicated. Look for the usual cast of characters from Republic Pictures, including Smiley Burnette (as the irresistible Frog Millhouse!). Songs include Take Me Back To My Boots and Saddle, and Ridin the Range.

programme.title: Arizona Bound

When Alkali is shot, Happy catches the outlaws but the Judge not only releases them, he discharges the Sheriff and tries to arrest Happy for rustling! Starring Bob Steele and Sterling Holloway, directed by Robert Emmett Tansey. 1945 (Color).

programme.title: Robin Hood of the Pecos

programme.title: Arena in 30
programme.desc: Monster Jam heads to the Diamond City as Arena Championship Series East takes over the Mohegan Sun Arena. Find out when the east series roars into Wilkes-Barre, Pennsylvania.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: Experience the raw power of the Arena Championship Series West as Monster Jam Replay takes over the Golden One Center in Sacramento, California. Round 4 features high-stakes action starting with JCB Racing, where Armando Castro and El Toro Loco battle through the bracket to defeat Carson Williams in Thunderoarus for the racing title. The excitement continues with the Great Clips Skills Challenge, featuring technical maneuvers and two-wheel stunts. The night reaches its peak during Freestyle, where Blake Granger and Monster Mutt Dalmatian deliver a spectacular performance, including a signature backflip, to sweep the competition. After a fierce battle against top competitors like Matt Cody in Grave Digger, Blake Granger is crowned the BKT Overall Event Champion.

programme.title: Monster Jam Replay
programme.desc: The Freestyle Mania Championship Series descends upon the historic Allstate Arena in Rosemont for a high-octane round of world-class monster truck action. Limits are shattered on the dirt as superstars like Weston Anderson and Fernando Martinez face off against hungry rookies in a series of punishing JCB Racing brackets and gravity-defying Best Trick competitions. Rivalries reach a boiling point on the tight Rosemont track, where veterans and newcomers alike must push their 12,000-pound machines to the edge in a final, spectacular Freestyle showdown to crown the night's champion.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We’re in the Serbian city of Novi kozarci, for the next stage in the world series. And what a fantastic line up we have for you again. But it is going to be one of the hottest stages yet. A Strongman competition in 44-degree heat. It will be a real challenge for these athletes to finish this event. From all over the world the strongmen came here for the title! Welcome to the heat hell in Serbia.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to day 2 in Serbia, and its another baking hot one. We are in Kikinda today! We’ve got three more gruelling events for our athletes. Sami Ahola is leading the pack, so can he be the first Finnish athlete to take an SCL title. Stay tuned to find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this competition, we have our athletes paired up. They’re going to have to take on each event together, having to factor in each other’s strengths and possibly weaknesses. Can the men who normally work alone, share their powers as a duo? Let’s find out!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Day 2 of the famous Team World championship here in Finland- Joensuu. Welcome to the final day of the world’s strongest team event. The race to be the best team in the world is coming to its crowing point. All is still wide open for any of these to take the title. Who is going to win? Will team Latvia keep their World Title or maybe Finland can attach them? Keep watching and we’ll find out.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome back to Strongman Champions League for another stage of the 2022 world tour. We’re in Esposende - Portugal in this beautiful setting next to the beach in front of a packed crowd with some of the strongest men the world has to offer. With a real Porsche deadlift and many other crazy stuff. So, lets get this show started.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Hello and welcome in Gloucester, UK. The world tour hasn’t been here for what feels like forever. And now for the first time in the Mekka of Strongman, the SCL World series will crown a great Champion with the SCL Title. It will be full with special wooden events, and a great winner! So ladies and gentleman, boys and girls, brace yourselves because I present to you strongman champions league UK.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Valentine's Day week launches with Carla Hall making an Easy Chicken Curry that she considers the perfect romantic dinner: warming, aromatic, and impressive without being stressful. The hosts debate whether cooking for a date should feel effortless or theatrical and share their own most romantic food memories.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly makes his legendary Sexy Time Chicken for Valentine's Day, a dish he swears exudes confidence, intention, and genuine romance with every bite. Guest Devyn Simone joins to share relationship etiquette wisdom, and the hosts explore what makes food truly feel romantic beyond just the recipe itself.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Amanda Freitag joins Clinton Kelly, Carla Hall, and Michael Symon for the Valentine's Day week finale, making a romantic pasta dish that inspires Michael to quote an Italian chef who calls the vigorous mixing of pasta 'the sound of love.' The hosts celebrate food as the ultimate love language and toast to the week with warmth, humor, and fresh pasta.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly arrives furious after producer Nick bans his gorgeous Ted Baker sweater due to moirÈ camera interference, and the ensuing sweater feud becomes the running gag of the episode as Chewed Up enters an Anything Goes week with no cooking theme and maximum creative freedom. Michael and Carla enjoy Clinton's frustration immensely.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly pitches his inspired Loaf Three Ways concept for Anything Goes week, proposing that each host make a different loaf ó savory, sweet, and somewhere in between ó in a format he has been developing for months. The hosts celebrate the Indiana Jones Temple of Doom opening number as the perfect anthem for a week with no rules.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Clinton Kelly replaces cooking with a March Madness-style bracket tournament for boxed brownie mixes, staging eight brands in head-to-head blind taste tests to crown an ultimate winner. After an epic series of eliminations, Duncan Hines Double Fudge emerges victorious at just $4.29 a box.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Jackie Bakula, beloved as Sparkles to Chewed Up fans, returns to the kitchen as a guest host while Carla Hall is away filming the Today Show, bringing her warm, professional energy and joining Michael Symon and Clinton Kelly for a celebratory cooking episode full of affection for the show.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Korean-American chef Esther Choi joins for Meat Optional Week, making Kimchi Fried Rice that converts even committed carnivores, while Clinton Kelly prepares his beloved home-alone tofu dish and the hosts celebrate the surprising depth and satisfaction of meatless cooking.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall closes out Meat Optional Week with a bold Butternut Squash Chili served over golden rounds of pre-made polenta, proving that a vegetarian chili can be just as hearty and craveable as any meat-based version. The hosts discuss the magic of pot liquor, winter herb gardening, and the underappreciated power of cooking tomatoes long enough to balance their acidity.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Michael Symon opens Home Alone Week by making his ideal personal omelet ó the dish he truly loves cooking just for himself ó as the hosts celebrate an entire week of cooking without compromise, audience, or spousal interference. The conversation digs into the authentic food preferences everyone quietly keeps to themselves.

programme.title: Chewed Up
programme.desc: Carla Hall stuns Michael and Clinton by revealing that her perfect home-alone meal is chili dogs ó a dish the Michelin-adjacent chef makes entirely for herself when no one is watching. The hosts celebrate the week's theme that authentic food preferences are often the most surprising and humanizing.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Show
programme.desc: Dave opens the episode by shucking oysters and making a specialty: kimchi consommé (2:07)! He then talks about his recent trip to Europe, eating his way through Copenhagen and Bath with his family (22:42). Copenhagen and its food scenes have matured a lot; maybe so has Dave. He finishes with a MOIF on the important things: Batman, airplane food, and samples.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Recipe Testing for Tyler Huggins" - Dave’s in the kitchen, practicing dishes for this week’s guest, Tyler Huggins. His first experiment: baking a pizza inside a potato. Will it work? Will any of this work? Is there a backup plan?

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Nico de Leon's Inasal Fried Chicken Sandwich" - Chef Nico de Leon shares his recipe for a delicious twice fried Inasal Chicken Sandwich, bringing in Filipino flavors and plenty of pro tips for creating a beautiful sandwich.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "Pork and Chive Dumplings with Chris Ying" - Chris Ying has made a lot of dumplings in his day. In fact, he always keeps a batch in the freezer for whenever the kids need a quick dinner. Today, he shares his go-to pork dumpling recipe, including two quick sauces.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "The Pizza Anytime Cocktail with John deBary" - Chris Ying is joined by special guest, bartender and author John deBary, to make a 90's inspired cocktail from John's new book "Saved by the Bellini". John walks Chris through the steps to create his Pizza Anytime drink—a twist on a Bloody Mary that takes things in a Bagel Bites direction and results in a delicious savory cocktail.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang Makes an Epic Thanksgiving Leftover Sandwich" - Dave has joined forces with Amazon Prime Thursday Night Football to create a new tradition for their first-ever Black Friday Football game on November 24—make a ridiculous sandwich for the game MVP using Thanksgiving leftovers. This is Dave's first attempt, so there are plenty of learnings discovered along the way as he tries to construct a worthy sandwich...making an entire Thanksgiving spread along the way. Get ready to unhinge your jaw, because this sandwich is something straight out of Shaggy and Scoob's playbook.

programme.title: Cooking School
programme.desc: "David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡)" - David Chang recreates his mom's holiday specialty (bindaetteok 빈대떡) - When Dave Chang was growing up, his mom always made mung-bean pancakes with kimchi, scallion, and pork belly for any celebratory dinner. So, as Dave gears up for the holidays, he's trying to channel her culinary energy into his own version of Korean bindaetteok. Try as he might, he just can't get it to taste exactly the same, but isn't that what makes moms special?

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime: Chicken Meatloaf with Creamed Corn and Mashed Potatoes - Chef Keith Corbin joins Chris in the kitchen to put together another easy family-friendly meal: chicken meatloaf with a zesty creamed corn and garlicy, buttery mashed potatoes.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Whole Roasted Chicken with Morgan McGlone: Our friend Morgan McGlone has cooked a lot of chicken—or "chook," as they call it in Australia, where he's from. He's a hell of a chef and restaurateur, as well as an excellent father to his son, Ryo. In this episode, he talks us through his roast chicken method, which, spoiler alert, involves a lot of butter. This is a bit of a long cook, so it's more of a weekend dish, but nothing beats breaking into a whole chicken with your family. The kids get to see food in its whole form, and pick the pices they want. The only decision you have to make is whether to share the best bits, or save them for yourself.

programme.title: Winning Mealtime
programme.desc: Winning Mealtime - Cantonese-Style Steamed Fish with Morgan McGlone: World-class Australian chef Morgan McGlone joins Chris Ying to share his go-to technique for preparing a whole steamed fish—something his son absolutely loves! A lot of people are intimidated by cooking a whole fish, but this is our plea to you to get your kids started on steaming/eating whole fish early in life!

programme.title: Recipe Lab with Chris Ying
programme.desc: "Mochi Potato Ball" - Testing out a viral recipe for cheese-stuffed Mochi Potato Balls with Honey Butter, Chris wonders whether he’s stumbled upon a quick hack for squishy rice balls or just a long way to nowhere.

programme.title: The Pinocchio - Sing Along With Tobee - Super Simple and more
programme.desc: Caitie made a fluffy bird marionette named Fifi! Fifi is full of jokes and Tobee can't stop laughing! Caitie knows another marionette who is just as silly as Fifi. It's Pinocchio! There's even a whole song about him called "The Pinocchio." After Caitie and Tobee sing and dance to the song, Fifi can't help but tell one last joke. And guess what? It quacks Tobee up!

programme.title: Little Billy's Skateboard - Carl's Car Wash and more

Billy hurries to Carl’s Car Wash, but Carl won't clean his skateboard - it's a CAR wash, not a SKATEBOARD wash! Billy does some quick thinking...and his skateboard might just go through the car wash after all!

With the help of old friends, Carl sets out on a big adventure to the darkest depths of the ocean, the highest heights in the land, and beyond! programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: Set off on a fun-filled "field trip" with your baby to discover animals found at the park, on the farm, and in your own backyard.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become better acquainted with the world, they grow curious about animals of all kinds, beyond just the family pet. And as their communication skills continue to develop, they enjoy imitating animal sounds as well. Baby Noah Animal Expedition takes your little explorer across the globe to meet animals -- two-by-two -- from the savannah, the rainforest and tropics, the Outback, the ocean and the Polar Regions.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As each day passes, babies' awareness of the world around them -- and all the wonders it holds -- continues to develop. Wild animals are especially intriguing and World Animals captures the spirtit of little ones' fascination with wild creatures as it introduces them to animals living in the jungle, in the ocean, and on the savannah.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Discover instruments through narration and repetition. Real-life images and sounds will engage viewers as they dance to upbeat classical favorites from Beethoven, Mozart and more. Join your favorite Baby Einstein characters to discover what makes each instrument unique!

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Get moving with Baby Einstein! Real, live-action footage and classical melodies engage young viewers as they discover simple words related to movement. Enjoy encouraging melodies and live-action footage of babies and animals as you learn and move alongside your favorite Baby Einstein friends. Dance along as you watch real, live action footage of animals, children, and toys.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: As babies develop, their understanding of the world, and how its pieces "fit" together, continues to progress. DISCOVERING SHAPES playfully introduces five basic forms circle, oval, triangle, square and rectangle as each appears in the context of toys, nature and everyday objects.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: At 12 months, babies can identify specific sounds, and they re also starting to match the sounds they hear with the objects that make them. Meet the Orchestra -- First Instruments presents your little "maestro" with a playful introduction to the sights and sounds of a real orchestra -- from the clashing of cymbals to the purring of the cello and everything in between!

programme.title: Baby Einstein New Classics
programme.desc: Learn all about music and rhythm in the world around us! Discover classical music and learn instrument names through narration and repetition. Inspire sweet dreams with gentle melodies and a comforting bedtime story. Learn about classical music from Beethoven, Bach, and Mozart. Sing and dance along to classic rhythmic songs like The Wheels on the Bus and see real-life images of instruments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein Classics
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.desc: When Sally uncovers Robotnik's plan to seed the cloud with toxic rain, they attempt a daring mission to sabotage the dirigible-like craft being transported by land vehicles. Mission fails when Sally, Bunnie and Antoine are captured.

programme.title: Sonic Underground

programme.desc: Sonic outsmarts Coconuts, then stumbles into a Convention of Bounty Hunter Robots where Robotnik puts a price on his head. After Sonic defeats all the Robot Bounty Hunters, Robotnik creates Scratch and Grounder to be his S.S.S.S.S. Squad.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic and Tails find an underground world of diamonds, but they are held captive there by a miserly Mole-Troll. When Robotnik comes to capture them, he accidently frees them from the Mole-Troll, who teams up with Sonic and Tails to defend his riches.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: Sonic saves a damsel in distress, and falls in love with her, not knowing she's a robot built by Robotnik. But when she has a chance to trap him, she helps him escape, realizing she has fallen for him.

programme.title: The Adventures of Sonic The Hedgehog
programme.desc: When Scratch and Grounder use Robotnik's new Slo-Mo Ray Gun to capture Sonic, Tails rescues him by reversing the gun and turning it on a tribe of friendly Tree Sloth People who become a high speed commando strike force against Robotnik.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that a Rainbow Ball Tournament is about to start soon but he is worried because the field is covered with pokey pods. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: In Rainbow Village, people are busy preparing for a dance marathon, a competition in which all of the villagers participate. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

Rainbow Ruby uses her magic suitcase to transform into a babysitter and starts babysitting the children.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Princess Kiki is asleep, UP IN THE AIR! But the music box is broken. // Rainbow Ruby and Choco discover cars moving in every direction. Ling Ling asks Rainbow Ruby for help and she uses her magic suitcase to become a police officer.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that today is Noodle Festival day in the village but there is a problem. Gina just announced that she will stop doing somersaults anymore because she accidentally hurt her friends while practicing.

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby
programme.desc: Ling Ling tells Rainbow Ruby that Rainbow Village friends were playing around the Rainbow fountain to cool off from the heat but water suddenly stopped coming out of the fountain. programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Rainbow Ruby

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Plum decides to hold a dance recital at Strawberry's Café Cabaret stage and sends out a stack of invitations. She forgets, however, to check the sign-up sheet at the Café and schedules it for the same night as Blueberry is scheduled to read to the baby Berrykins. Strawberry tells Plum she cannot hold the recital in the Café on her chosen day because the Café is booked.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Raspberry is distraught when she suspects her friends have copied her design on her lantern for the "Glimmerberry Gathering".

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While sipping cider in Strawberry's café, the girls muse about how they cannot wait for winter to arrive. They list the various traditions they love about the season but the one they all agree on is the Glimmerberry Ball. Strawberry mentions that she doesn't think the café can hold the party this year because of how the town has grown. The girls decide to split up and search for a new location.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: Lemon is ecstatic. She races out of her salon and goes around to the other girls' houses proclaiming that she "did it!" and beckoning them to join her. They follow her back and are completely dazzled by her newest creation - Glamicures. They are brightly colored, jeweled manicures with tiny microchips inside that play songs when the wearer moves her hand. Each girl lines up to receive her new glamicure and soon there is a cacophony of color and sound.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: While working in her store, Orange overhears the Berrykins laughing and shouting outside. When she goes to the door to investigate, a clump of dandelion fluff gets blown inside chased by three Berrykins. She watches as they head butt the clump around until it floats back toward Orange. Just as it floats close, she gives it a bat sending it outside and the Berrykins happily chasing after it. Wanting in on the fun, she joins them.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: With all the Baby Berrykins running around Berry Bitty City, Princess Berrykin decides to build a Day Care Center and playground. But she's worried because it's dull-looking - all grey metal and brown wood. She asks Strawberry whom might be good to help her out. And two names immediately come to her mind - Lemon and Raspberry! The Princess confesses she's always admired their sense of design and style.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures
programme.desc: After returning to the café after a walk with her pets, Strawberry is met by Mr. Longface. programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake's Berry Bitty Adventures

programme.title: Landslide: A Portrait of President Herbert Hoover
programme.desc: Herbert Hoover was a politician and a humanitarian whose legacy has been largely defined by the Great Depression. When he was elected president in a landslide victory in 1928, Hoover had never before held public office. Even so, his humanitarian work and career as a mining engineer, businessman and U.S. Secretary of Commerce carried him to a win. When the stock market crashed on October 29, 1929, Hoovers agenda was derailed by the worsening economic crisis. Despite various efforts to pull the nation out of depression, Hoovers unsuccessful attempts led to his sound defeat by Franklin Roosevelt just four years after his landslide victory. LANDSLIDE looks at the life of the controversial figure through interviews with notable historians and Hoover scholars.The program explores the facts and fictions behind the presidency of Herbert Hoover including The Great Depression and the role of the Federal Reserve. Hoovers early life in Iowa and abroad, the international experiences that led to his decision to run for office, his presidency and political philosophy, and the lasting impacts of his policy decisions during and after the depression are revealed. Through interviews with notable scholars such as David Kennedy, Amity Shlaes, Robert Reich, Tim Egan and Timothy Walch, this biography sheds new light on Hoovers difficult tenure and enduring legacy.

programme.title: Elvis and the USS Arizona
programme.desc: ELVIS AND THE USS ARIZONA tells the surprising story of how one of music's biggest icons helped to establish a USS Arizona memorial in Pearl Harbor.In the late 1950s, the USS Arizona Memorial Commission was struggling to raise money for a permanent memorial to honor the 1,177 crewmen who lost their lives aboard the battleship on December 7, 1941. After a successful fundraising push, momentum had slowed, and though construction on the approved design was underway, only half of the necessary funds had been raised.Recently honorably discharged from the U.S. Army and headed to Hawaii to begin filming Blue Hawaii, Elvis was presented by his manager to the idea of a benefit concert to support the memorial fund. He agreed without hesitation and on March 25, 1961, performed to a sold-out crowd at the Bloch arena on the naval base. Elvis concert would draw public attention to the plight and help galvanize efforts to finish the USS Arizona Memorial as it still stands today.

programme.title: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: ABOVE AND BEYOND highlights one of the most compelling escape and survival stories from World War II that of former Rhode Island Governor Bruce Sundlun (1920-2011). Sundlun, a U.S. Army Air Corps pilot, flew a B-17 bomber nicknamed the Damn Yankee on a dozen combat missions during World War II. On December 1, 1943, Sundlun's unlucky 13th mission would take him (a Jewish-American) and his crew into Hitler's backyard the heart of Germany's industrial Ruhr Valley. While on the mission, the bomber drew heavy fire from German fighter planes and crashed in a field in the Nazi-occupied Belgian town of Jabbeke. By nightfall, Sundlun remained the only member of his 10-man crew not killed or captured by the Germans. Muddied and bloodied, Sundlun eluded the Germans by hiding in plain sight face down between a row of crops. He soon found refuge in a local farmhouse, his wounds tended by a local family. For the next several days, courageous Catholic priests and local members of the French Resistance sheltered Sundlun and provided him with fake identity papers. With help from a vast underground network, Bruce fled to occupied France, where he joined the Resistance (under the code name Salamander) and assisted them in their fight against the Nazis. Eventually smuggled into neutral Switzerland, Sundlun would spy for the U.S. Office of Strategic Services (OSS), the precursor to the CIA, tasked with communicating with French Resistance and German officers looking to surrender.The documentary unfolds as Sundlun's daughter Kara retraces his wartime journey. In Jabbeke, Kara meets author and local historian Luc Packo, as well as witnesses to her father's plane crash, who still celebrate Sundlun's contribution to their country's liberation.
